# Yosoi

> AI-powered CSS selector discovery for web scraping. Give Yosoi a URL and it uses an LLM once to automatically discover the best CSS selectors for extracting structured data from any site.

- Fast — 3 seconds to discover selectors per domain
- Cheap — ~$0.001 per domain (one-time cost)
- Reusable — selectors are cached locally; scrape thousands of articles for free after discovery
